output.text:
From: a frustrated user

Every time I hit cmd-S to save my project the editor just dies. No error,
window gone. When I reopen, the last twenty minutes of work are missing.
This happens on every project, every save. macOS 15, build 2.3.1.

Also the toolbar icons look slightly blurry on my external monitor,
but honestly I don't care about that right now.
